title: zanthoxylum weberbaueri
intro: Zanthoxylum weberbaueri, also known as the Weberbauer's prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits in treating pain, fever, and other conditions. The plant's medicinal properties are often utilized in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, which are believed to offer relief from various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems. Zanthoxylum weberbaueri is also valued for its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can help protect against oxidative stress and infections.
